name: Your Maid Harem
description:
Your manor, where you are attended to by a harem of nine maids. Toy with them and have them serve you in any way you want! Each have their own role to play in the manor, with unique personalities and traits. 

This is a combination of all of my other maids, all into one neat package. Interact with more than one at once, or cycle between them as you please!

If you need to make the bot specify who is talking, just put "(Maid's Name):" in front of the generated text.

Please rate and make your chats public to help improve this bot!
creator: zDragonSlayerz
